tools.name: explain_app
tools.title: Explain LocalGallery Pro
tools.description: Return a description of LocalGallery Pro, its Zero-Cloud policy, storage providers, and current features.

tools.name: extract_exif_from_url
tools.title: Extract EXIF from an image URL
tools.description: Fetch an image over HTTPS server-side and return the EXIF metadata (date taken, camera, lens, dimensions, GPS if present). The image bytes are not stored.

url.description: Publicly reachable HTTPS URL of an image (JPEG/HEIC/TIFF).

tools.name: send_telegram_photo
tools.title: Send a photo to Telegram
tools.description: Forward an image URL to Telegram's sendDocument API using the caller-provided bot token and chat id. The bot token is used only for this single request and is never stored server-side. This mirrors the direct browser -> Telegram flow the app uses.

botToken.description: Telegram bot token from @BotFather. Used once, not stored.

chatId.description: Target chat id (e.g. your @userinfobot id, or a channel id).

imageUrl.description: HTTPS URL of the image/document to send.

tools.name: generate_mock_photos
tools.title: Generate mock photos
tools.description: Return a deterministic list of placeholder photo entries (id, name, width, height, date, thumbSrc) matching the demo grid. Useful for testing gallery layouts.

count.description: How many mock photos to return (1–200).

seed.description: Seed to vary the generated set.
